validate-harness-001/requirements:
# Requirements: /health endpoint

## Goal
Add a `/health` endpoint to the existing chi-based Go HTTP service so monitors can probe liveness without authentication.

## Constraints
- Existing chi router; no new dependencies.
- Handler returns HTTP 200 with JSON body `{"status":"ok"}`.
- No DB hit; no auth; no rate limiting.
- Single Ginkgo v2 spec at the existing seam.
- ~200 LOC ceiling across implementation + spec.

## Success criteria
- `GET /health` returns 200 and `{"status":"ok"}`.
- Existing routes are unaffected.
- Spec passes; lint clean.

## Out of scope
- Liveness/readiness split.
- Auth or middleware changes.
- New deployment manifests.
validate-harness-001/analysis:
# Analysis: /health endpoint

## Affected files
- `internal/http/router.go` (single line: `r.Get("/health", HealthHandler)`).
- `internal/http/health.go` (new): `HealthHandler` writes JSON `{"status":"ok"}` with status 200.
- `internal/http/health_test.go` (new): Ginkgo spec uses `httptest.NewRecorder` against the chi mux.

## Risks
- None of substance. The chi router accepts new routes idempotently.

## Open questions
None — requirements are unambiguous.

## Clearance Checklist
- [x] Requirements complete and unambiguous.
- [x] Affected files enumerated.
- [x] Test seam identified.
- [x] No architectural decisions pending.
validate-harness-001/plan:
# Plan: /health endpoint

## Slice 1 — handler + spec (single commit)

**Files touched.** `internal/http/health.go` (new, ~25 LOC), `internal/http/health_test.go` (new, ~40 LOC), `internal/http/router.go` (one line).

**Behaviour locked.**
- `GET /health` returns HTTP 200.
- Response body is exactly `{"status":"ok"}` with `Content-Type: application/json`.
- No request body or query parameters consumed.
- Existing routes unchanged.

**Arbiter.** `internal/http/health_test.go` — Ginkgo spec mounting the chi router and asserting status, body, and Content-Type with Gomega matchers.

**Sequencing.** Single commit, single slice. RED → GREEN in the same delivery (no pending tests).

## Effort
Simple. ~70 LOC delta total.
